title: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Paleo Bites
description: A delicious and healthy side dish featuring roasted Brussels sprouts and crispy paleo bites.
instructions: 2. Cut the Brussels sprouts in half and place them in a bowl.
3. Drizzle the olive oil over the Brussels sprouts and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
4. Toss the Brussels sprouts to coat them evenly.
5. Spread the Brussels sprouts out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
6. Roast the Brussels sprouts in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
7. Meanwhile, cook the paleo bites according to the package instructions.
8. Once the Brussels sprouts are done, remove them from the oven and sprinkle with paleo bites.
10. Garnish with additional paleo bites if desired.
